title: Roro aur Hero, Bhoot Mast, Zabardast!
subTitle: Roro, a ten-year-old boy gets into problematic situations in his life and is rescued by his ghost friend Hero who uses his powers to help him but makes the situation more chaotic.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Six rescue dogs, led by a young boy called Ryder, embark on a series of exciting and adventurous missions to keep Adventure Bay safe from danger.

title: Akul Nakul
subTitle: Akul and Nakul are two good 'Asura' children who descend to planet Earth in order to change human beings' perspective on 'Asuras'.

title: Krishna Balram
subTitle: Krishna and his older brother Balram share a playful and loving sibling bond. Together they embark on thrilling adventures and daring escapades with Radha.

title: Ninja Hattori
subTitle: A little ninja, Hattori Kanzo, befriends a lazy 10-year-old boy named Kenichi Mitsuba. Hattori helps Kenichi with his problems while watching over him.

title: Mighty Raju
subTitle: A four-year-old Raju, who received superpowers due to a scientific blunder, decides to use them for the good of humanity.

title: Krishna : Makhan Chor
subTitle: Lord Krishna, a young boy, is very mischievous and goes on various adventures. However, his escapades always cause trouble for his mother.

title: Chak De Mighty Raju
subTitle: Karaati gives special powers to the cricket team of Janubnagar, in order to defeat the Aryanagar cricket team. After learning this, Mighty Raju sets out to save his cricket team.

title: Luv Kushh
subTitle: Luv and Kush, two endearing six-year-old twin brothers, live at Rishi Valmiki's ashram along with their mother, Sita, and have many adventures.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Six rescue dogs, led by a young boy called Ryder, embark on a series of exciting and adventurous missions to keep Adventure Bay safe from danger.

title: Ninja Hattori
subTitle: A little ninja, Hattori Kanzo, befriends a lazy 10-year-old boy named Kenichi Mitsuba. Hattori helps Kenichi with his problems while watching over him.

title: Mighty Raju Aryanagar Under Water
subTitle: Karati detonates a meteor that causes a fatal tidal wave, leading to the flooding of Aryanagar. Raju then sets out to save his city.

title: Krishna & Balram Warrior Princess
subTitle: When Krishna and Balram accidentally expose the secret hideout of a princess, they decide to protect and help her defeat her enemies.

title: Krishna - The Birth
subTitle: The demonic forces of several kings pose themselves as royal order and cause chaos amongst the people. However, things change after Lord Vishnu is born as baby Krishna to Vasudev and Devaki.
